name: Address
script:
docname = doc.name
doc = frappe.get_doc("Address", docname)

gstin = doc.gstin
gst_category = doc.gst_category

for l in doc.links:
    fd = l.link_name
    fl = l.link_doctype
    
    if fl == "Customer": 
        if fd:
            fdcust = frappe.get_doc("Customer", fd)
            fdcom = frappe.get_doc("E Commerce Settings")
            
            agnt = fdcom.company
            branch = fdcom.branch
            division = fdcom.division
            warehouse = fdcom.website_warehouse
            matching_quotation = frappe.get_all("Quotation",
                                                 filters={"party_name": fd, "docstatus": 0},
                                                 fields=["name"])

            if matching_quotation:
                fdquot = frappe.get_doc("Quotation", matching_quotation[0]["name"])
                for fdchild in fdquot.items:      
                    if doc.state == "Tamil Nadu":
                        fdcust.tax_category = "In-State"
                        fdquot.tax_category = "In-State"  
                    else:
                        fdcust.tax_category = "Out-State"
                        fdquot.tax_category = "Out-State"  
                    
                    fdquot.company = agnt
                    fdquot.warehouse = warehouse
                    fdchild.warehouse = warehouse
                    fdquot.gst_category = gst_category
                    fdquot.save()
                    
                fdcust.company = agnt
                fdcust.branch = branch
                fdcust.division = division
                fdcust.gstin = gstin
                fdcust.gst_category = gst_category
                fdcust.via_ecommerce_portal = "1"
                fdcust.website_warehouse = warehouse
                fdcust.save()

name: Customer
script:
docname = doc.name

customer_doc = frappe.get_doc("Customer", docname)

customer_name = customer_doc.customer_name

customer_name_uppercase = customer_name.upper()

customer_doc.customer_name = customer_name_uppercase

if customer_doc.naming_series == "ICUS.####":
    customer_doc.company = "ITFD PRODUCTS" 
if customer_doc.naming_series == "SCUS.####":
    customer_doc.company = "SKYTEC SOLUTIONS"
if customer_doc.naming_series == "TCUS.####":
    customer_doc.company = "TEKPRO SOLUTIONS"
        
customer_doc.save()

name: Supplier
script:
docname = doc.name

supplier_doc = frappe.get_doc("Supplier", docname)

supplier_name = supplier_doc.supplier_name

supplier_name_uppercase = supplier_name.upper()

supplier_doc.supplier_name = supplier_name_uppercase

if supplier_doc.naming_series == "ISUP.####":
    supplier_doc.company = "ITFD PRODUCTS" 
if supplier_doc.naming_series == "SSUP.####":
    supplier_doc.company = "SKYTEC SOLUTIONS"
if supplier_doc.naming_series == "TSUP.####":
    supplier_doc.company = "TEKPRO SOLUTIONS"

supplier_doc.save()

name: Item
script:
name =doc.item_name

for warehouse_entry in doc.warehouse:
    warehouse_name = warehouse_entry.warehouse
    warehouse_type = warehouse_entry.type
    warehouse_rack = warehouse_entry.rack
    warehouse_bin = warehouse_entry.bin
    
    item = frappe.get_doc("Item",name)           
                
    existing_entry = False
    for item_warehouse in item.warehouse_:
        if (item_warehouse.warehouse == warehouse_name and item_warehouse.type == warehouse_type and 
              item_warehouse.rack == warehouse_rack and item_warehouse.bin == warehouse_bin):
            existing_entry = True
            break            
    
    if not existing_entry:            
        new_warehouse_entry = item.append("warehouse_", {})        
        new_warehouse_entry.type = warehouse_entry.type        
        new_warehouse_entry.warehouse = warehouse_entry.warehouse        
        new_warehouse_entry.rack = warehouse_entry.rack        
        new_warehouse_entry.bin = warehouse_entry.bin
    else:
        frappe.msgprint("The Entries are Already Exist")
        
    item.save()

name: Integration Request
script:
e_inv = frappe.get_doc("Spokes E-Invoice Portal")

e_inv.count = e_inv.count + 1
e_inv.save()

name: Purchase Invoice
Stock Entry
Bank Details
script:
if doc.party_type == "Supplier":
    if doc.party:
       
        supplier_doc = frappe.get_doc("Supplier", doc.party)  
        if supplier_doc:
           
            
            frappe.db.set_value("Supplier", doc.party, "bank_account_no", doc.bank_account_no)
            frappe.db.set_value("Supplier", doc.party, "ifsc_code", doc.ifs_code)
            frappe.db.set_value("Supplier", doc.party, "branch_code", doc.branch_code)
            frappe.db.set_value("Supplier", doc.party,"account_name", doc.account_name)
            # frappe.db.set_value("Supplier",doc.party,"",doc.bank)
            frappe.db.set_value("Supplier",doc.party,"account_email",doc.account_mail_id)
            frappe.db.set_value("Supplier",doc.party,"alternate_account_email",doc.alternate_mail_id)

name: Purchase order
Opportunity
script:
if doc.sales_stage:
    doc.opportunity_owner = frappe.session.user
    if not doc.sales_stage_details or len(doc.sales_stage_details) == 0:
        child = doc.append("sales_stage_details", {})
        child.sales_stage_name = doc.sales_stage
        child.opportunity_value = doc.opportunity_amount
        child.date = doc.date or frappe.utils.today()
        child.days = 0
    else:
        last_row = doc.sales_stage_details[-1]
        if last_row.sales_stage_name != doc.sales_stage:
            pd = frappe.utils.getdate(last_row.date)
            cd = frappe.utils.getdate(frappe.utils.today())
            dd = (cd - pd).days if pd else 0

            child = doc.append("sales_stage_details", {})
            child.sales_stage_name = doc.sales_stage
            child.opportunity_value = doc.opportunity_amount
            child.date = frappe.utils.today()
            child.days = dd

name: Attendance
script:
employee = doc.employee
checkin_date = frappe.utils.getdate(doc.time)

if doc.log_type == 'IN':
    existing_attendance = frappe.db.exists(
        "Attendance",
        {
            "employee": employee,
            "attendance_date": checkin_date,
            "docstatus": ["!=", 2]  # exclude cancelled
        }
    )

    if not existing_attendance:
        attendance = frappe.new_doc("Attendance")
        attendance.employee = employee
        attendance.attendance_date = checkin_date
        attendance.status = "Present"
        attendance.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        attendance.submit()
